content:
E-TIMS API Documentation 
1 | P a g e 
 
Authentication  
Use API key header given like below for all requests: 
$headers = [ 
  'X-API-Key' => 'your-given-api-key’, 
  'Content-Type' => 'application/json' 
]; 
API Technical information 
Title Contents 
Interface Data Format JSON 
API Server Address (Test) Give base URL e.g http://62.169.23.132:4122/api/ 
API Server Address (Production) 
Give base URL e.g http://62.169.23.132:4123/api/v1/ 
Reference Data Apis 
Parameter Description Data Type Required Length 
businessPin Business KRA PIN String Mandatory 11 
branchId Branch Identifier String Mandatory 2 
lastReqDt 
 
Last request date time 
(yyyyMMddHHmmss) 
String Mandatory 14 
a) Code List 
Method: POST Only 
Endpoint: {{baseURL}}/api/reference/codes-list 
Description: This endpoint is used to receive necessary standard codes and data from the 
eTIMS API Server, which is the basis of generating item & invoice data.  
b) Class List 
Method: POST Only 
Endpoint: {{baseURL}}/api/reference/class-list 
Description: This endpoint is used to receive necessary standard class list codes from the 
eTIMS API Server, which is the basis of generating item & invoice data.  
c) Notice List 
Method: POST Only 

E-TIMS API Documentation 
2 | P a g e 
 
Endpoint: {{baseURL}}/api/reference/kra-notices 
Description: This endpoint is used to receive necessary notifications/notices managed by 
KRA from eTIMS API server 
d) Branch List 
Method: POST Only 
Endpoint: {{baseURL}}/api/reference/branches 
e) Description: This endpoint is used to receive the activated branch office 
information of head office & other branches/stores from eTIMS API server. 
Register Item Api 
Method: POST 
Endpoint: {{baseURL}}/api/items/register 
Description: Registers taxpayer item details for processing on ETIMS. 
Request Body Parameters 
Parameter Data Type 
Data  
Length 
Required Description 
businessPin String 11 Mandatory Unique business KRA pin identifier  
branchId String 2 Mandatory 
Identifier of the business branch. "00" 
usually denotes the head office. 
Items Integer 1-1000 Mandatory 
Total number of items listed in 
ItemsList. 
ItemsList Array N/A Mandatory 
List of item objects containing 
item/service details. 
itemName String 100 Mandatory Name of the product or service  
ClassCode String 10 Mandatory 
Classification code of the item/service 
as per KRA standards. 
itemCd String 20 Mandatory unique item code used for tracking. 
CountryCode String 5 Mandatory 
Country code where the 
product/service is registered (e.g., 
"KE" for Kenya). 
ItemType String 5  Mandatory 
Type of item (e.g., "1" = Service, "2" 
= Finished Goods, “3” = Raw 
Material). 
UnitOfQuantity String 5 Mandatory Measurement unit of the item  
PackagingUnit String 5 Mandatory Packaging unit used for the item  
SellingPrice Number 18,2 Mandatory Selling price of the product/service. 
TaxationType String 5 Mandatory 
Tax category applied ( "A" = Exempt 
VAT, "B" = 16% VAT, etc.). 
OpeningStock Integer 18,2 Optional Opening stock balance of the item. 

E-TIMS API Documentation 
3 | P a g e 
 
 
RegisterItem - Sample JSON 
Sample Request: 
{"businessPin":"P051139031T","branchId":"00","Items":2,"ItemsList":[{"itemName":"A
ccomodation 
Services","ClassCode":"99021013","itemCd":"KE1NTU01","ItemType":"1","UnitOfQuanti
ty":"U","PackagingUnit":"NT","SellingPrice":3000,"TaxationType":"A","OpeningStock":0}
,{"itemName":"Printing 
Services","ClassCode":"99030000","itemCd":"KE1NTU02","CountryCode":"KE","ItemTy
pe":"1","UnitOfQuantity":"U","PackagingUnit":"NT","SellingPrice":50,"TaxationType":"B
","OpeningStock":0}]} 
Sales Invoice/Receipt  
Description: Submits a sales invoice with/out customer and item details for processing. 
N/B: To send Invoice data to the eTIMS API server, the consistency of the data is essential 
and therefore the invoice number must be unique and is a global counter for both invoices 
& credit notes. Call the next-invoice-counter Api ({{baseUrl}}/api/next-invoice-number-
counter) prior to calling the process invoice or credit-note apis to get the next invoice 
number managed by the etims-gateway.  
Sample Request for next invoice number 
{"businessPin":"{{businessPin}}","branchId":"{{branchId}}"} 
Sample Response 
{"success":true,"businessPin":"P052077586R","branchId":"00","nextInvoiceNumber":4} 
Field Value/Description 
success True 
businessPin P052077586R 
branchId 00 
nextInvoiceNumber  4 
Sales Invoice/Receipt Apis 
Method: POST 
Endpoint: {{baseURL}}/api/invoice/process 

E-TIMS API Documentation 
4 | P a g e 
 
Request Body Parameters 
Parameter Description Data 
Type 
Required Length 
businessPin Business KRA PIN String Mandatory 11 
branchId Branch Identifier String Mandatory 2 
invoiceNumber Unique invoice number Integer Mandatory 15 
traderInvoiceNo Trader's invoice reference String Mandatory 15 
customer.name Customer full name String Optional 60 
customer.pin Customer KRA PIN String Optional 11 
customer.mobile Customer phone number String Optional 10 
customer.address Customer address String Optional 20 
items[].itemCode Product or service code String Mandatory 20 
itemClassCode Classification code String Mandatory 10 
itemName Name of the item/service String Mandatory 200 
quantity Quantity sold String Mandatory 13,2 
price Unit price String Mandatory 18,2 
taxType Tax category (e.g., A, B) String Mandatory 5 
PaymentInfo 
amountPaid 
Total amount paid String Mandatory 18,2 
changeGiven Change returned String Optional 18,2 
paymentModes[].mode Payment method (e.g., 
Cash, Card) 
String Mandatory 2 
amount Amount paid using this 
mode 
String Mandatory 18,2 
remark Any extra notes String Optional 100 
sendSales - Sample JSON 
Sample Request: 
{"businessPin":"P000000002G","branchId":"00","invoiceNumber":5001,"traderInvoice
No":"TRD1234511","customer":{"name":"John 
Doe","pin":"A012345678Z","mobile":"254712345678","address":"123 Main Street, 
Nairobi"},"items":[{"itemCode":"ITEM001","itemClassCode":"99010000","itemName":"S
ample 
Product","quantity":2,"price":1000,"taxType":"B"},{"itemCode":"ITEM002","itemClassC
ode":"99010000","itemName":"Service 
Fee","quantity":1,"price":500,"taxType":"A"}],"paymentInfo":{"amountPaid":2500,"chan
geGiven":0,"paymentModes":[{"mode":"Cash","amount":2500}]},"remark":"Sample 
invoice for testing"} 
Response Body Parameters 
Field Type Description 
success boolean Indicates if the request was successful  
data object Contains the response details. 
etimsResponse object 
ETIMS response object with signing 
and transmission details. 

E-TIMS API Documentation 
5 | P a g e 
 
resultCd string Result code returned by ETIMS  
resultMsg string Message description of the result 
resultDt 
string 
(yyyyMMddHHmmss) 
Date and time of the result. 
data object 
Nested data related to the signed 
receipt. 
rcptNo integer Receipt number generated. 
 intrlData string Internal transaction data identifier. 
rcptSign string Unique receipt signature from ETIMS. 
totRcptNo integer Total receipt number count. 
vsdcRcptPbctDate 
string 
(yyyyMMddHHmmss) 
Date/time when VSDC published the 
receipt. 
sdcId string Sales Device Controller ID assigned. 
mrcNo string 
Machine Registration Code from 
ETIMS. 
pdfGenerated boolean 
Indicates whether a PDF version of the 
receipt/invoice was generated. 
pdfPath string File path to the generated PDF. 
qrData string (URL) 
QR code URL to access the ETIMS 
receipt online. 
receiptNo string Unique receipt number issued  
CuInvoiceNumber 
string 
Unique ETIMS control unit invoice 
number 
 
Sample JSON Response: 
 
{"success":true,"data":{"etimsResponse":{"resultCd":"000","resultMsg":"INVOICE IS SIGNED BUT NOT 
TRANSMITTED","resultDt":"20260104140125","data":{"rcptNo":187,"intrlData":"NALQAN7ZRMAS2HULQP6IO
EZ434","rcptSign":"MYGQJML5WTBWW7VD","totRcptNo":187,"vsdcRcptPbctDate":"20260104140118","sdcId":
"KRACU0300003605","mrcNo":"KRA00378582"}},"pdfGenerated":true,"pdfPath":"pdfs/invoice_TRD-
8_20260104140126.pdf","qrData":"https://etims-
sbx.kra.go.ke/common/link/etims/receipt/indexEtimsReceiptData?Data=P052077586R00MYGQJML5WTBWW
7VD","CuInvoiceNumber":"KRACU0300003605/5014","receiptNo":"TRD-8"}} 
Send CreditNote Api 
Method: POST 
Endpoint: {{baseURL}}/api/credit-note/process 
Description:  Processes a credit note against an existing invoice. 
 

E-TIMS API Documentation 
6 | P a g e 
 
Request Body Parameters 
Parameter Description Data Type Required Length 
businessPin Business KRA 
PIN 
String Mandatory 11 
branchId Branch Identifier String Mandatory 2 
originalInvoiceNumber Invoice number 
to reverse 
String Mandatory 15 
creditNoteNumber Credit note 
reference 
number 
String Mandatory 15 
traderInvoiceNo Trader credit 
note number 
String Optional 60 
customer.name Customer full 
name 
String Optional 11 
customer.pin Customer KRA 
PIN 
String Optional 10 
customer.mobile Customer phone 
number 
String Optional 20 
customer.address Customer 
address 
String Optional 20 
items[].itemCode Product or 
service code 
String Mandatory 10 
items[].itemClassCode Classification 
code 
String Mandatory 200 
items[].itemName Name of the 
returned 
item/service 
String Mandatory 13,2 
items[].quantity Quantity 
returned 
String Mandatory 18,2 
items[].price Unit price String Mandatory 5 
items[].taxType Tax category String Mandatory 18,2 
reason Reason for credit 
note 
String Optional 18,2 
sendCreditNote - Sample JSON 
Sample Request: 
{"businessPin":"P000000002G","branchId":"00","originalInvoiceNumber":5002,"credit
NoteNumber":5002,"traderInvoiceNo":"CN56798","customer":{"name":"John 
Doe","pin":"A012345678Z","mobile":"254712345678","address":"123 Main Street, 
Nairobi"},"items":[{"itemCode":"ITEM001","itemClassCode":"99010000","itemName":"S
ample Product - Return","quantity":1,"price":1000,"taxType":"B"}],"reason":"Product 
defective - customer return"} 
 

E-TIMS API Documentation 
7 | P a g e 
 
Sample Response: 
{"success":true,"data":{"etimsResponse":{"resultCd":"000","resultMsg":"INVOICE IS SIGNED BUT NOT 
TRANSMITTED","resultDt":"20260104141128","data":{"rcptNo":188,"intrlData":"WWA2YLMPKIV7MV7NCQ4P
AQLZ7Q","rcptSign":"L23TNBAY5GO46JK6","totRcptNo":188,"vsdcRcptPbctDate":"20260104141121","sdcId":"
KRACU0300003605","mrcNo":"KRA00378582"}},"pdfGenerated":true,"pdfPath":"pdfs/credit_note_CN-
006_20260104141129.pdf","qrData":"https://etims-
sbx.kra.go.ke/common/link/etims/receipt/indexEtimsReceiptData?Data=P052077586R00L23TNBAY5GO46JK
6","CuInvoiceNumber":"KRACU0300003605/5013","receiptNo":"CN-006"}} 
Response Body Parameters 
Field Type Description 
success 
boolean Indicates if the request was successful  
data 
object Contains the response details. 
etimsResponse 
object 
ETIMS response object with signing and 
transmission details. 
resultCd 
string Result code returned by ETIMS  
resultMsg 
string Message description of the result 
resultDt 
string 
(yyyyMMddHHmmss) 
Date and time of the result. 
data 
object Nested data related to the signed receipt. 
rcptNo 
integer Receipt number generated. 
 intrlData 
string Internal transaction data identifier. 
rcptSign 
string Unique receipt signature from ETIMS. 
totRcptNo 
integer Total receipt number count. 
vsdcRcptPbctDate 
string 
(yyyyMMddHHmmss) 
Date/time when VSDC published the 
receipt. 
sdcId 
string Sales Device Controller ID assigned. 
mrcNo 
string Machine Registration Code from ETIMS. 
pdfGenerated 
boolean 
Indicates whether a PDF version of the 
receipt/invoice was generated. 
pdfPath 
string File path to the generated PDF. 
qrData 
string (URL) 
QR code URL to access/verify the ETIMS 
receipt online. 
receiptNo 
string Unique receipt number issued  
CuInvoiceNumber 
string 
Unique ETIMS control unit invoice 
number 
itemRegistration batch 
Method: POST 
Endpoint: {{baseURL}}/api/items/register-batch 
Description: Registers a batch of items using an uploaded file. 
 

E-TIMS API Documentation 
8 | P a g e 
 
Request Body Parameters 
Parameter Description Data Type Required Length 
businessPin Business KRA PIN String Mandatory 11 
branchId Branch Identifier String Mandatory 2 
fileName Name of the Excel file 
containing item details in 
root folder 
String Mandatory Xls File 
itemRegistration batch - Sample JSON 
Sample Request: 
{"businessPin":"P000000002G","branchId":"00","fileName":"itemsFile.x
lsx"} 
Sample Response: 
 {"success":true,"message":"Item registration batch  
completed","data":{"totalItems":6,"successful":[{"itemIndex":1,"itemCode":"KE3NTU0000001","itemName":"Por
k Chipolatas 200gms","response":{"resultCd":"000","resultMsg":"The request has been processed 
successfully","resultDt":"20250724150257","data":null}}],"failed":[],"summary":{"successCount":1,"failureCoun
t":0}}} 
Device License Status (On Production Only) 
Method: POST 
Endpoint: {{baseUrl}}/api/v1/license/status 
Request Body Parameters 
Parameter Description Data Type Required Length 
businessPin Business KRA PIN String Mandatory 11 
branchId Branch Identifier String Mandatory 2 
 
Sample Request  
{ 
  "businessPin": "{{businessPin}}", 
  "branchId": "{{branchId}}" 
} 
 
API Response Data 
{"success":true,"data":{"businessPin":"P052077586R","branchId":"00","status":"active","expiresAt":"2027-04-
10T20:16:41.000Z","revokedAt":null,"revokedReason":null}} 

E-TIMS API Documentation 
9 | P a g e 
 
 
Field Value/Description 
success True 
businessPin P052077586R 
branchId 00 
status active 
expiresAt 2027-04-10T20:16:41.000Z 
revokedAt None 
revokedReason None 
Item Code Generation Algorithm 
Algorithm to generate item code is as follows 
For example:  
ItmCode: KE2NTBA0157 
KE 2 NT BA 00000000157 
Product 
Country of 
Origin  
Exp, Kenya, KE 
Product Type (Finished 
Product) 
Product Type Ranks 
 Exp, 
 1, Raw Material 
 2, Finished Product 
 3, Service without 
stock 
Packaging 
Unit 
Exp, NET 
Quantity 
Unity  
Exp, Barrel, 
Kg etc. 
 
Increments from 
001 to N value 
  
Product Type Codes 
Code  
Classification 
  
Code Sort Order Code Name Code Description  
1 1 Raw Material Raw Material  
2 2 Finished Product Finished Product  
3 3 Service Service Item Without Stock  
     

E-TIMS API Documentation 
10 | P a g e 
 
Tax Type Codes 
Code  
Classification 
  
Code Sort Order Code Name Code 
Description 
 
A 1 A A –Exempt  
B 2 B-16.00% B-16.00%  
C 3 C C – 0%  
D 4 D D – Non-VAT  
Sales Receipt Type 
Code  
Classification 
 Code Classification Name 
Code Sort Order Code Name Code 
Description 
remark 
S 1 Sale Sale  
R 2 Credit Note Credit Note  
Payment Method 
Code  
Classification 
 Code Classification Name 
Code Sort Order Code Name Code 
Description 
remark 
01 1 Cash  Cash  
02 2 Credit  Credit  
03 3 Check  Bank Check 
Payment 
 
04 4 Card  Payment Using 
Card 
 
05 5 Mobile Money Transaction using 
mobile money 
system 
 
06 6 Other  Other Means of 
Payment  
 
 
 

E-TIMS API Documentation 
11 | P a g e 
 
 
E-TIMS API Error codes  
Code System Description 
000 Server It is succeeded 
001 Server There is no search result 
891 Client An error occurred while Request URL is created. 
892 Client An error occurred while Request Header data is created. 
893 Client An error occurred while Request Body data is created. 
894 Client An error regarding server communication occurred. 
895 Client An error regarding un allowed Request Method occurred. 
896 Client An error regarding Request Status occurred. 
899 Client An error regarding Client occurred. 
900 Server There is no Header information 
901 Server It is not valid device 
902 Server This device is installed 
903 Server Only VSCU/OSCU device can be verified. 
910 Server Request parameter error 
911 Server There is no request full text 
912 Server There is a request Method error. 
921 Server Sales or sales invoice data which is declared cannot be received. 
922 Server Sales invoice data can be received after receiving the sales data. 
990 Server The maximum number of views are exceeded 
991 Server There is an error during registration 
992 Server There is an error during modification 
993 Server There is an error during deletion 
994 Server There is an overlapped Data
